User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account in the SquadForge application, storing personal and contact information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for login and communication.

avatarUrl.description: URL to the user's profile avatar image (optional).

notificationsEnabled.description: Indicates if the user has globally enabled push notifications.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

Team.title: Team
Team.description: Represents a sports team or group within the application, providing a collaborative space for its members.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Team entity.

teamName.description: The official name of the team.

sport.description: The sport the team is associated with.

teamLogoUrl.description: URL to the team's logo image (optional).

teamCode.description: A unique 6-character alphanumeric code used for joining the team.

creatorId.description: Reference to the User who created this team.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the team was created.

isPro.description: Indicates if the team has an active Pro subscription.

Feature.title: Feature
Feature.description: Represents a distinct feature or capability within the application.

defaultEnabled.description: Whether the feature is enabled by default for new teams.

Plan.title: Plan
Plan.description: Defines a subscription plan with a set of enabled features.

description.description: Description of what the plan offers.

isPublic.description: Whether the plan is visible to all users in the pricing section.

isContactOnly.description: If true, requires manual sales contact to activate.

teamLimit.description: The number of teams allowed on this plan (null for unlimited).

features.description: A map of feature IDs to booleans indicating if they are enabled for this plan.

/features/{featureId}.description: Global collection defining available application capabilities.

/plans/{planId}.description: Global collection defining subscription tiers and their associated features.
